title: Bulk Slow Cooker Shredded Chicken Base
description: Tender shredded chicken cooked in a slow cooker, ideal for batch prep and reuse in sandwiches, wraps, bowls, and casseroles.
instructions: Place sliced onion and garlic in the bottom of the slow cooker.
Add chicken on top of the vegetables.
Season with salt, pepper, paprika, and oregano.
Pour chicken broth and drizzle olive oil over the top.
Cover and cook on low for 6 hours or high for 3–4 hours until chicken is tender.
Remove chicken and shred using two forks.
Return shredded chicken to the slow cooker and mix with juices.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat in microwave with some cooking liquid to retain moisture, or warm in a skillet over medium heat.

batch_notes: Cook the entire batch at once and shred for easy portioning.
Keep some cooking liquid with the chicken to maintain moisture during storage.
meal_variations: BBQ chicken sandwiches with buns and sauce
Chicken tacos with tortillas and toppings
